description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 3rd; Slot feet; Price 7,500 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION These soft leather boots are incredibly light and comfortable, with thin soles reinforced by strips of tough hide that provide an unexpected amount of support and protection to the foot. On command, these boots allow the wearer to levitate as if she had cast levitate on herself. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Wondrous Item, levitate; Cost 3,750 gp
